event: View of Venice with the Bridge of Sighs
description: A monochromatic painting of a Venetian canal scene, likely depicting the Bridge of Sighs. The enclosed bridge with ornate windows spans between two buildings over a narrow canal. A gondola floats below with a small figure. Gondola poles rise from the water on the left. A dark bird flies in the upper right corner. The painting has a dreamy, atmospheric quality with muted greys and whites. Cracking or web-like texture overlays the right side of the composition.
